Meet Lola

Hi, I'm Lola.

fox-red lab. UK born. can dribble a football with actual paws (yes, really). named after Leo because she earned it. flying business class since forever. every clip 100% real. 🐾 stick around - there's a lot of ball to chew.

The signature move

No other dog
does this.

dogs fetch. lola dribbles. paw to paw, down the line, absolutely sending it. can't be faked. can't be copied. 24M people watched and they didn't look away. ⚽

Have ball, will travel

Seat 11A,
naturally

no crate. no hold. seat 11A, window, obviously. ✈️ london → wherever. ball under the seat. looking out at clouds like the sky is just a very large football pitch.
